allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name']\) for r in d['results']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Pokedexes:', [p['name'] for p in d['pokedexes']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vgs=set\(\); [vgs.add\(v['version_group']['name']\) for m in d['moves'] for v in m['version_group_details']]; print\('BDSP in moves?', 'brilliant-diamond-shining-pearl' in vgs\)")
